topStories.description: Sens. Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

topStories.title: Slovak detained along Mizoram-Myanmar border, likely to be deported
topStories.description: The man, a resident of Thailand, was allegedly trying to cross into Myanmar to meet a friend; he did not have a protected area permit; detention comes after American, Ukrainians tried to cross border to train armed ethnic groups

topStories.title: Mizoram's Lalduhoma Demolishes Youth Congress's Land Deals Allegations
topStories.description: Mizoram Chief Minister Lalduhoma slammed the Youth Congress for making baseless allegations on land purchase

topStories.title: Defense startup Shield AI lands $12.7B valuation, up 140%, after U.S. Air Force deal
topStories.description: In one year, Shield AI's value has leaped 140%. This after it won a contract to be the software provider to Anduril's Fury fighter jet for the U.S. Air Force.

topStories.description: Ousted Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro's son, whose father faces a second hearing before a New York court Thursday, told AFP he trusts the US legal system but that the case was tainted by his...

topStories.description: Earlier in the day, in a post on Truth Social, Trump claimed that Iran had been "begging" for a deal but has publicly maintained that they are just "looking at our proposal".

dailyNews.title: Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro, wife produced in New York court in drug trafficking case, months after capture by US
dailyNews.description: Nicolas Maduro, the former President of Venezuela, on Thursday (local time), headed into a New York courtroom as he seeks to have his drug trafficking indictment dismissed, AP reported.

dailyNews.title: Pak not neutral, Trump will listen to Modi: US war expert pitches India as mediator
dailyNews.description: Pak not neutral Trump will listen to Modi US war expert pitches India as mediator

dailyNews.title: Iran-US war impacted ‘fertilisers, steel and aluminum’ the most, says Saudi Arabia Finance Minister
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia’s Finance Minister Al-Jadaan said that while oil has dominated media coverage, it is refined products – including fertilisers, steel and aluminum – that have been most affected due to the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.

dailyNews.title: From DKS to ‘Samrat Ashoka’, Karnataka MLAs dissolve party lines to seek free IPL tickets: ‘We are VIPs’
dailyNews.description: BJP leader raises issue in House; Congress MLA explains why KSCA must give special treatment to MLAs, demands five tickets each; speaker says four could do.

dailyNews.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
dailyNews.description: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. Iran's demands include an end to aggression and financial compensation. The US seeks Iran's nuclear disarmament and missile program limits. Both sides need to claim victory for a deal. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

dailyNews.title: NHL star's fiancée makes emotional return after undergoing harrowing heart transplant ordeal
dailyNews.description: Rasmus Dahlin's fiancée Carolina Matovac returned to a Sabres game months after suffering major heart failure and receiving a transplant in France.

dailyNews.title: Tom Brady inquired about NFL comeback while as a Raiders owner, but the league 'didn't like the idea'
dailyNews.description: Tom Brady said he inquired about an NFL comeback, but the league was not keen on the idea as he is a minority owner of the Las Vegas Raiders.

dailyNews.title: Trump pressures GOP to scrap filibuster, says 'desperate' Schumer 'will make a deal'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is pressuring the Senate GOP to scrap the filibuster in order to ram their priorities through the legislative chamber.

dailyNews.title: After Wooing Trump With Deals, Pakistan Gets a Seat at the Table
dailyNews.description: Steve Witkoff, a diplomatic envoy, used the Board of Peace to announce an agreement that could raze a Pakistan-owned Manhattan hotel. Now the country is involved in negotiating peace talks with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Eyes White House Treaty Room for Latest Renovation Project
dailyNews.description: President Trump is making new plans in one of the most significant renovations in the history of the White House.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Begins Investigations Into Three Medical Schools
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department’s demands for admissions-related data from Stanford, Ohio State and the University of California, San Diego, represent a flex of federal power.

dailyNews.title: Four Problems for Trump in Birthright Citizenship Case
dailyNews.description: The president must confront a 1952 federal law, the possibility that millions will lose their citizenships, stateless foundlings and a fluid future.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is "begging" for deal and Witkoff confirms 15-point proposal
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke about the Iran war at a Cabinet meeting and said Tehran is "begging" for a deal to end the conflict. CBS News' Aaron Navarro reports.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff says U.S. presented Iran with 15-point plan for potential peace proposal
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late."

dailyNews.title: Trump slams Starmer's reaction to Iran war and questions U.K. alliance
dailyNews.description: During a Cabinet meeting at the White House, President Trump reacted to British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's reluctance to get involved in the Iran war. This comes as Mr. Trump says Iran is seeking an end to the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran apparently gifted the U.S. boats of oil that moved through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Iran gifted the U.S. multiple boats of oil that were moved through the Strait of Hormuz. Mr. Trump made the comments during a Cabinet meeting after saying the gifts were proof that the regime was looking to negotiate an end to the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
